# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

default:
  tags: []
  interruptible: true
  before_script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - chmod -R +x "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/ci" 2>/dev/null || true

variables:
  # Developers can override any of these in project/group CI/CD variables or in the pipeline UI.
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "ci/build.sh"
  BUILD_ARGS: ""
  BUILD_SHELL: "bash"
  BUILD_WORKDIR: "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}"
  BUILD_ENV_FILE: ""
  BUILD_PRE_SCRIPT: ""
  BUILD_POST_SCRIPT: ""
  BUILD_DEBUG: "false"
  BUILD_ALLOW_FAILURE: "false"
  BUILD_TIMEOUT: "60m"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  timeout: $BUILD_TIMEOUT
  allow_failure:
    rules:
      - if: '$BUILD_ALLOW_FAILURE == "true"'
        when: always
      - when: never
  rules:
    - when: always
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      if [ "${BUILD_DEBUG}" = "true" ]; then
        set -x
      fi

      cd "${BUILD_WORKDIR}"

      if [ -n "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}" ] && [ -f "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}" ]; then
        set -a
        . "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}"
        set +a
      fi

      if [ -n "${BUILD_PRE_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "==> Running BUILD_PRE_SCRIPT"
        sh -lc "${BUILD_PRE_SCRIPT}"
      fi

      if [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "==> Running repository build script: ${BUILD_SCRIPT} ${BUILD_ARGS}"
        chmod +x "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" || true
        "${BUILD_SHELL}" "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ${BUILD_ARGS}
      else
        echo "ERROR: Build script not found: ${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
        echo "Provide a repo script (default: ci/build.sh) or override BUILD_SCRIPT."
        exit 1
      fi

      if [ -n "${BUILD_POST_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "==> Running BUILD_POST_SCRIPT"
        sh -lc "${BUILD_POST_SCRIPT}"
      fi

  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 1 week
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - out/
      - artifacts/
      - "*.log"
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
